chapters.content_preview: 1. Dasha at birth — Moon is in Cancer at 12 degree 40 min. It is in Pushya Nakshatra. Pushya is 8" Nakshatra from Ashwini. Add 3 to 8, which gives 11. Divide 11 by 8. Remainder is 3. Third Dasha is of Dhanya and is the Dasha at birth.  2. Balance at birth — Pushya Nakshatra is fr

chapters.content_preview: 2. Balance at birth — Pushya Nakshatra is from 3 deg. 20 min. to  16-deg. 40 min. The span is 13 deg. 20 min. chapters.content_preview: 4. Sub periods — Suppose we want to know Siddha sub period in Ulka major. Multiply 6 by 7, which give 42. Again multiply it by 10. Result 420 is the number of days or one year two Months as the sub period of Siddha in Ulka major period and vice-versa.  ---  ## Page 9
